positive: Dark Academia illustration of a study desk at midnight. Stacked leather-bound books, an antique brass compass, a burning candle, and a half-open journal with elegant calligraphy. Moody, chiaroscuro lighting, oil painting texture, deep mahogany and emerald tones.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, bright light, modern technology, cartoonish
